scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @today-table/core build && pnpm --filter @today-table/firebase-storage build && pnpm --filter @today-table/sqlite build && pnpm --filter @today-table/web dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @today-table/core build && pnpm --filter @today-table/firebase-storage build && pnpm --filter @today-table/sqlite build && pnpm -r typecheck
